prompt_text:
### Demographics: 61-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 11 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Planned dialysis)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III)
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Community-acquired pneumonia (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Planned dialysis); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (10 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~7.5 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Linagliptin 5mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 88.8 kg; Height 162.5 cm; BMI 33.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 115/73 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.6%; 9 months ago 9.0%; 6 months ago 8.5%; 3 months ago 8.0%; current 6.0%), FPG (12 months ago 272mg/dL; 9 months ago 243mg/dL; 6 months ago 231mg/dL; 3 months ago 165mg/dL; current 125mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 88.7kg; 9 months ago 86.7kg; 6 months ago 86.3kg; 3 months ago 89.3kg; current 88.8kg), Height (12 months ago 162.5cm; 9 months ago 162.5cm; 6 months ago 162.5cm; 3 months ago 162.5cm; current 162.5cm), BMI (12 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 34.0kg/m²; current 33.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 115mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 70mmHg; 9 months ago 71mmHg; 6 months ago 72mmHg; 3 months ago 71mmHg; current 73mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 34U/L; 9 months ago 27U/L; 6 months ago 27U/L; 3 months ago 35U/L; current 30U/L), AST (12 months ago 6U/L; 9 months ago 5U/L; 6 months ago 7.0U/L; 3 months ago 13U/L; current 10U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 9.0mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 7.2mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 8.0mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 4.8mL/min/1.73m²; current 6mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 458mg/g; 9 months ago 373mg/g; 6 months ago 563mg/g; 3 months ago 577mg/g; current 384mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 72mg/dL; 9 months ago 73mg/dL; 6 months ago 73mg/dL; 3 months ago 72mg/dL; current 70mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 53mg/dL; 9 months ago 54mg/dL; 6 months ago 57mg/dL; 3 months ago 56mg/dL; current 55mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 149mg/dL; 9 months ago 148mg/dL; 6 months ago 149mg/dL; 3 months ago 153mg/dL; current 141mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 10.8g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has limited financial resources and prefers low-cost options (budget ≤ KRW 200,000/month).
